prestazioni: AM29 5.2L V12 (AE31) twin-turbo conversion using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with billet 76mm compressor wheels, TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates, and custom 4-inch titanium downpipes by CPP Performance, targeting 950hp on E85 with a Motec M150 ECU managing direct port methanol injection via Snow Performance Stage 3 kit

Full titanium valvetrain upgrade with Del West titanium intake/exhaust valves (1mm oversized), Ferrea Competition Series valve springs, and custom billet camshafts by Schrick (290° intake / 294° exhaust duration, 12.5mm lift) paired with a bespoke dry-sump system by Peterson Fluid Systems (8-stage, 12-quart capacity) with titanium scavenge pumps

Chassis reinforcement via a full carbon-fiber monocoque stiffening kit by RML Group, including a 3D-printed titanium front strut tower brace, carbon-fiber torque tube, and a custom rear subframe with integrated roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, 8-point, T45 steel with carbon-fiber cladding), mated to a Tremec TR-9070 7-speed dual-clutch transmission with a Pankl Racing billet input shaft and upgraded carbon synchros
estetica: Full Zagato Heritage bodywork conversion with hand-beaten aluminum front splitter (30% larger than OEM), carbon-fiber rear diffuser by Novitec, and a custom 3D-printed titanium rear wing (adjustable via hydraulic actuators, 1.2m chord) with integrated Gurney flaps, all finished in Aston Martin Q by R-Reforged 'Platinum White' with hand-painted 'Zagato Double Bubble' roof in bare carbon fiber

Bespoke 22-inch forged magnesium wheels by Dymag (RX-2 model, 9.5x22 front / 12.5x22 rear) with titanium lug nuts, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/30 R22 front, 325/25 R22 rear) and paired with a custom air suspension system by Air Lift Performance (3P management, 4-corner height sensors, and adjustable damping via AccuAir e-Level)

Interior reimagined with full Alcantara upholstery by Saddleback Leather (including door cards and headliner), titanium shift paddles by Capristo, a bespoke carbon-fiber steering wheel by MOMO (DBS GT Zagato Continuation Edition, 380mm diameter, Alcantara grip with titanium thumb rests), and a custom digital dash by AIM MXS Strada (12-inch, carbon-fiber bezel) with integrated data logging for Motec ECU and Bosch MS4.0 traction control
